testcase.name: testUsuario_Create
testcase.system-out:
17:06:45.814 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.tw.CrudIntegrationTest]: CrudIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 17:06:45.983 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.tw.TwApplication for test class com.tw.CrudIntegrationTest

Found 9 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-04-21T17:06:50.219+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-04-21T17:06:50.273+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-04-21T17:06:50.616+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection org.sqlite.jdbc4.JDBC4Connection@5cc3e49b 2026-04-21T17:06:50.619+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-04-21T17:06:52.301+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-21T17:06:53.340+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-04-21T17:06:54.790+02:00 WARN 26172 --- [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-04-21T17:06:55.224+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] o.s.b.a.w.s.WelcomePageHandlerMapping : Adding welcome page template: index 2026-04-21T17:06:55.989+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] o.s.s.web.DefaultSecurityFilterChain : Will secure any request with [org.springframework.security.web.session.DisableEncodeUrlFilter@24e63b9f, org.springframework.security.web.context.request.async.WebAsyncManagerIntegrationFilter@31eb5ed6, org.springframework.security.web.context.SecurityContextHolderFilter@18a8a40e, org.springframework.security.web.header.HeaderWriterFilter@5ac25491, org.springframework.web.filter.CorsFilter@e30573c, org.springframework.security.web.csrf.CsrfFilter@4f578fc2, org.springframework.security.web.authentication.logout.LogoutFilter@7d6f094e, org.springframework.security.web.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter@57bd0b3c, org.springframework.security.web.savedrequest.RequestCacheAwareFilter@1ad28f2, org.springframework.security.web.servletapi.SecurityContextHolderAwareRequestFilter@2044a11b, org.springframework.security.web.authentication.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter@2c70da80, org.springframework.security.web.access.ExceptionTranslationFilter@6587c92f, org.springframework.security.web.access.intercept.AuthorizationFilter@1dd1093c] 2026-04-21T17:06:57.221+02:00 INFO 26172 --- [ main] com.tw.CrudIntegrationTest : Started CrudIntegrationTest in 10.962 seconds (process running for 12.621)

testcase.name: testUsuario_EmailDuplicado
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-21T17:07:00.410+02:00 WARN 26172 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : SQL Error: 19, SQLState: null 2026-04-21T17:07:00.411+02:00 ERROR 26172 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : [SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_UNIQUE] A UNIQUE constraint failed (UNIQUE constraint failed: usuarios.email)
